title: 自动化时代 AutomationEra
description: Add multiple advancements about automation farms & redstone machines
body:
# Minecraft Automation farm & Redstone Circuit Tutorial MOD
## 我的世界生电教程类模组

### 1.21.2+ Versions Use REI to replace EMI for machine pages
[BILIBILI INTRO video](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1nH3cz7ELC/#reply114766341281891)
- This mod add several advancements about **Automation farm & Redstone Circuit** with EMI/REI describe pages and specific teaching building farms tutorials with 3Ds.
添加生电机器(自动农场&红石机器)的进度和，EMI/REI相关界面和详细机器建造讲解（带3D介绍）

- !!! Server site unsupports advancements !!!
- !!! 服务端不支持成就 !!!

- now adds about **100** automation advancements.
EMI pages adds about 100 pages of machines descriptions
- now adds over **20** basic automaticly farms building tutorials (Open with G key)which can opened in EMI/REI pages aswell
- 现已添加100自动化成就和100页EMI机器介绍页面
- 现已添加20+基础机器建造教程（G键打开界面）。通过REI/EMI界面也可以打开

- Mod support English and Chinese for language options 现已支持中英双语

![Advancements - EN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19454f4ad85f9424b7374b91805a42c076f1afc0.png)
![new EMI pages for machines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3a40649a7e79183f4334a4fd6bd93d56401e68c.png)
![Tutorial page for machines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d55c0c3b492295cd028b153ac71046d3c3c74387_0.webp)
